news.t: Hedge funds loaded up on these two chip stocks this year. Should you buy them too?

holdings.infoBox: GVIP is an equity ETF with a total of 51 individual holdings. The top holdings are Marvell Technology stock at 3.11%, Micron Technology at 2.74%, Sandisk at 2.65%, Applied Materials at 2.58%, and Lam Research at 2.50%.

overview.description: The Goldman Sachs Hedge Industry VIP ETF (GVIP) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Goldman Sachs Hedge Fund VIP index. The fund tracks an equal-weighted index of the 50 most-frequently held US companies selected from the portfolios of hedge funds. GVIP was launched on Nov 1, 2016 and is issued by Goldman Sachs.
infoTable: Goldman Sachs Hedge Fund VIP Index

data.title: Hedge funds loaded up on these two chip stocks this year. Should you buy them too?
data.text: Nvidia's stock has been a favorite for some time, but two other semiconductor companies recently cracked Goldman's list of popular hedge-fund holdings.

data.title: Popular hedge fund positions plummet, average fund down 7.3% year-to-date
data.text: Hedge funds are seeing many of their most popular positions plummet. CNBC's Leslie Picker joins 'Squawk Box' with the details.
